channel.title: waapply
channel.description: Artificial Intelligence news updates from waapply.

item.title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you
item.description: What if you could outsource your doomscrolling? That’s the premise behind the new startup Noscroll , which is offering an AI-powered bot that can browse?

item.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
item.description: OpenAI on Thursday released GPT-5.5 , its newest AI model, which the company calls its “smartest and most intuitive to use model” yet. The?

item.title: Era raises $11M to build a software platform for AI gadgets
item.description: Earlier in April, the startup Era held a gathering in New York for artists who had received its developer kit. The artists showed off the various mini gadgets?

item.title: Grab a ticket today: The first StrictlyVC of 2026 kicks off in just a week in San Francisco
item.description: StrictlyVC?s first San Francisco event of the year is nearly here, and with just a week to go, now?s the time to grab yourself a ticket . The venture and?

item.title: Another customer of troubled startup Delve suffered a big security incident
item.description: The story of embattled compliance startup Delve keeps hitting twists and turns. TechCrunch has confirmed that Delve was the compliance company that performed?

item.title: AI galaxy hunters are adding to the global GPU crunch
item.description: NASA announced that it will launch the Nancy Grace Roman space telescope into orbit in September 2026, eight months ahead of schedule. The new space telescope?

item.title: Beehiiv rolls out new creator tools, including webinars and customizable paywalls
item.description: It’s been clear for a while that Beehiiv wants to be more than just a newsletter platform. The L.A.-based company announced a slew of updates on?

item.title: India’s app market is booming ? but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
item.description: India’s mobile app market is generating record revenue, with in-app purchases crossing $300 million in the first quarter, up 33% year-over-year,?

item.title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B ? here’s where the money is going

item.title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
item.description: At Google Cloud Next this week, the tech giant announced a bevy of new updates to Workspace, its subscription-based productivity suite aimed at professionals.?
